title: Prismatic Burst
description: OGL WebGL ray-marched prismatic burst with a gradient texture and configurable animation modes (spin, expand, pulse). Mouse hover activates an interactive mode.
prompt_text:
# Prismatic Burst

OGL WebGL ray-marched prismatic burst with a gradient texture and configurable animation modes (spin, expand, pulse). Mouse hover activates an interactive mode.

## Use when
- Creating a bold, colorful hero background that demands attention on first load.
- Adding prismatic light effects to emphasize a value proposition section.
- Providing a premium, glowing focal point behind product content.

## Stack
- Framework: react
- Libraries: ogl

## Install
```bash
npm install ogl
```

## Component — prismatic-burst.tsx
```tsx
// Source: animations_009.md
// Export: PrismaticBurst (default)
// Props: className, style, colors, animationMode ('spin'|'expand'|'pulse')
// Uses OGL Renderer, Program, Mesh, Triangle, Vec2, Vec3
// Ray-march GLSL shader with gradient texture and mouse uniform
// See full source in raw/animations_009.md
```

## Notes
- Requires OGL (~100 KB). Lazy-load for performance.
